title: calamagrostis neglecta subsp. euneglecta
intro: Calamagrostis neglecta subsp. euneglecta, also known as the Poa annua grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Calamagrostis neglecta subsp. euneglecta include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce bloating, and act as a natural remedy for respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
